properties.displayName: System Time Discovery via tzutil w32tm datetime or Get-Date
properties.description: Detect commands that query local system time or timezone, often used prior to time-based evasion or scheduling.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\tzutil.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " /g" or CommandLine|contains has " /s ") and Image endswith "\w32tm.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "/query" or CommandLine|contains has "/status" or CommandLine|contains has "/configuration") and Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has " time /t" or CommandLine|contains has " date /t") and (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-Date")
